prompt.en: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: full-body character sprite / cutout source. Create exactly ONE full-body clean anime character illustration of Suhara Yosuke, a 36-year-old male high-rise elevator dispatcher. Single character only. Generate the character from the current attributes. He is a bulky soft-strong adult man with a substantial rounded body, very broad shoulders, thick chest, thick arms, warm clean skin, a square-round face, calm slightly drooping deep hazel-green eyes, a steady gentle smile, short dark brown-black hair with warm gold-gray highlights, and a short old scar on the web of his right hand. Outfit: a tight plain white T-shirt wrapping his thick torso with subtle abs visible through the fabric, a light gray short-sleeve dispatcher uniform shirt, deep green dispatcher suspenders, charcoal straight utility pants, black soft-soled commuter boots, deep green fingerless dispatcher gloves, and a wide canvas utility belt. Signature props: a brass floor-number plate and a compact radio, clearly readable and not oversized. Fantasy hook: only a few restrained warm-white elevator-door calibration lines near the brass floor plate, low glow, compact and tidy. Style: Kyoto Animation-inspired fresh TV anime cel shading, crisp clean linework, simple readable shadow shapes, polished modern urban fantasy character design, urban first and fantasy second, visually denoised, minimal dirt and grime. Composition: centered standing pose, full body visible from head to boots, generous padding, no cropping, clean cutout-ready silhouette. The style reference is only for body proportion, line quality, coloring method, and drawing style; do not copy the reference character face, clothing, pose, props, colors, or identity. Background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background only, one uniform green color, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no reflection, no scenery. Absolute bans: no UI, no infographic, no diagram, no character sheet, no text, no letters, no labels, no icons, no panels, no app screen, no multiple characters, no extra main objects, no watermark, no strong diffuse glow, no dust, no oil stains, no rust, no wasteland mood. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere on the character, props, effects, reflections, or aura.
prompt.cn: 只画一个人物：栖原曜介，36岁男性，高层电梯调度员。软壮厚实的大体格，宽肩厚胸，大手臂，暖肤色，方圆脸，低垂圆钝的深榛绿色眼睛，沉稳微笑，深棕黑短发带暖金灰高光，右手虎口有短浅旧疤。穿白色紧身T-shirt，衣料贴合厚实躯干并能看到若隐若现的腹肌轮廓；外搭浅灰短袖制服衬衫，深绿调度背带，炭黑直筒工装裤，黑色软底通勤靴，深绿半指调度手套，宽帆布调度腰带。手持黄铜楼层牌和小型对讲机，身边只有少量电梯门缝暖白校准线，表现夜间高楼电梯调度员的都市轻奇幻身份。京都动画式清爽TV动画赛璐璐，干净线条，概括阴影，现代都市为主、奇幻为辅。单人全身立绘，从头到脚完整可见，留出边距。背景必须是纯 #ff00ff 平面品红绿幕。不要UI、信息图、设定表、文字、标签、场景、多人、强烈发光、灰尘、油污、铁锈、废土感。不要在角色或特效里使用 #ff00ff。

forbidden: profile attributes appended directly to image prompt
generation notes appended directly to image prompt

chromaKey.name: magenta
chromaKey.reason: Prompt includes green/cyan/healing or translucent light effects; magenta keeps those effects away from the removable key color.
